bosses.name: Abductor Virgins
bosses.description: Deadly mechanical constructs who wield massive blades.

bosses.name: Alecto, Black Knife Ringleader
bosses.description: Remarkably agile and aggressive warrior. Dangerous even for those with shield coverage...
bosses.location: Ringleader's Evergoal, Liurnia of the Lakes

bosses.name: Alecto Black Knife Ringleader
bosses.description: Remarkably agile and aggressive warrior. Dangerous even for those with shield coverage...

bosses.name: Alabaster Lord
bosses.description: An Evergaol prisoner wielding a vicious sword and the void with murderous intent.
bosses.location: Royal Grave Evergaol, Liurnia of the Lakes

bosses.name: Adan, Thief Of Fire
bosses.description: An evergaol prisoner and former battle mage, Adan wields a spiked flail and uses stolen knowledge of fire magic to great effect.

bosses.name: Ancient Dragon Lansseax
bosses.description: Lansseax was the sister of Fortissax. It is said that she took the from of a human to commune with the knights as a priestess of the ancient dragon cult.

bosses.name: Ancestor Spirit
bosses.description: A glowing spirit that takes the form of a large deer, making it a menacing threat when charging at targets.

bosses.name: Ancient Hero Of Zamor
bosses.description: Noticeably agile, frost-made creature suceptible to magic attacks.

bosses.name: Beast Clergyman
bosses.description: Temporarily overtaken by their bestial rage, the Beast Clergyman attacks ferociously, throwing rocks and themselves at their foes. Calm their aggression and return them to their senses.

bosses.name: Astel, Stars Of Darkness
bosses.description: A hostile, massive Dragon-Fly creature. Menacing and extremely powerful.
bosses.location: Yelough Anix Tunnel in Consecrated Snowfield

bosses.name: Beast Of Farum Azula
bosses.description: Underground-living creature found at Groveside Cave

bosses.name: Beastman Of Farum Azula
bosses.description: The beasts of Groveside Cave rally around the prowess of the Beastman of Farum Azula

bosses.name: Bell Bearing Hunter
bosses.description: Menacing and slow-paced, it wields a large, red-glowing sword and a shield combined with a full body armor and a chilling cape.
bosses.location: Warmaster's Shack, Northern Stormhill, Church of Vows, East Liurnia, Hermit Merchant's Shack, Leyndell Royal Captial, Dragonbarrow, North Caelid

bosses.name: Black Blade Kindred
bosses.description: Imposing Gargoyle wielding a massive armament

bosses.name: Black Knife Assassin
bosses.description: Relentless and agile dark figures carrying a
bosses.location: Deathtouched Catacombs, Black Knife CatacombsSage's Cave

bosses.name: Bloodhound Knight Darriwil
bosses.description: The merciless bloodhounds attack with grace and agility, never backing down or giving a moment's rest.

bosses.name: Burial Tree Watchdog
bosses.description: A large feline-hound looking guardian that serves as a "Watchdog"for the Burial Tree of the Stormfoot Catacombs.

bosses.name: Cleanrot Knight
bosses.description: Powerful, dexterous Knight capable of distanced, very rapid attacks. Its spear and sword are a threat to any light-armored fighter.
bosses.location: Stillwater Cave, Liurnia of the Lakes

bosses.name: Borealis The Freezing Fog
bosses.description: Frost Dragon guarding the frozen lake of Mountaintop of Giants, emits a permanent blizzard.

bosses.name: Commander Niall
bosses.description: Commander Niall is a tall and built knight with a peg leg, clad in heavy armor, wielding a halberd that doubles as a battle standard. He is accompanied by two Spectral Banished Knights, one equipped with dual swords and the other equipped with a sword and shield.

bosses.name: Commander O'neil
bosses.description: A large and imposing human commander who wields a halberd that doubles as a battle standard, rousing his spirit minions to battle with unquenchable fervor.

bosses.name: Crucible Knight Ordovis
bosses.description: Large, heavy and fully armored. With the ability to materialize fiery wings and attack from above. Attacks with the huge power of Ordivis's Greatsword and a Greatshield. Slow, but extremely tough and highly dangerous.

bosses.name: Crystalians
bosses.description: Crystal energy in the form of a human with devastating power.

bosses.name: Deathbird
bosses.description: A bipedal bird with arms and a bird skull for a head and is found in various locations
bosses.location: Limgrave, Weeping Peninsula, Liurnia of the Lakes

bosses.name: Decaying Ekzykes
bosses.description: A pale white dragon — its scales blighted by the same scarlet rot that plagues the region of Caelid. It silently waits along the southern highway, awaiting unsuspecting travelers to fall prey to its deathly onslaught.

bosses.name: Demi-human Chief
bosses.description: The darkness of Coastal Cave hides a den of those who may look almost human, but are certainly not.

bosses.name: Demi-human Queen Maggie
bosses.description: Sovereign Demi-Human creature roaming the lands of Mt. Gelmir

bosses.name: Divine Bridge Golem
bosses.description: Enormously large and lethargic Golem that slowly storms into battle when it becomes aware of your presence.

bosses.name: Demi-human Queen Margot
bosses.description: Sovereign Demi-Human creature concealed within isolated caves.

bosses.name: Draconic Tree Sentinel
bosses.description: Massive knight clad in golden armor atop a giant horse.

bosses.name: Dragonkin Soldier
bosses.description: A large, hostile humanoid creature awaken from its drowse straight into battle.

bosses.name: Cemetery Shade
bosses.description: Amorphous and shadowy being belonging to the catacombs
bosses.location: Tombsward Catacombs, Black Knife Catacombs,Caelid Catacombs,

bosses.name: Crucible Knight
bosses.description: A formidable, dexterous fighter skilled in melee combat.
bosses.location: Stormhill Evergaol,, Stormveil Castle,, Auriza Hero's Grave

bosses.name: Dragonkin Soldier Of Nokstella
bosses.description: Huge humanoid-like creature located at the underground caves of Uhl Palace Ruins

bosses.name: Dragonlord Placidusax
bosses.description: A massive in size, two-headed dragon capable of immense acts of annihilation.

bosses.name: Elden Beast
bosses.description: It is said that long ago, the Greater Will sent a golden star bearing a beast into the Lands Between, which would later become the Elden Ring.

bosses.name: Elemer Of The Briar
bosses.description: Wielding the stolen sword from the Marais family, Elemer of the Briar stands at the top of the castle waiting.

bosses.name: Esgar, Priest Of Blood
bosses.description: A highly aggressive humanoid priest

bosses.name: Erdtree Avatar
bosses.description: A large headless create which resembles a tree stump.
bosses.location: Minor Erdtree (Weeping Peninsula), Minor Erdtree (Liurnia Southwest), Minor Erdtree (Liurnia Northeast), Minor Erdtree (Caelid), Minor Erdtree (Mountaintops East)

bosses.name: Fallingstar Beast
bosses.description: A massive quadruped with a long spiky tail and a head reminiscent of a centipede's, with massive mandibles protruding from its face. It behaves much like a bull and appears to have seismic powers, allowing it to control the earth within its chamber.
bosses.location: Sellia Crystal Tunnel, Caelid, Altus Plateau

bosses.name: Fell Twins
bosses.description: Two bulky ogre-like creatures fighting side by side with red-hot armament

bosses.name: Fia's Champions
bosses.description: Five invaders summoned in an endurance combat in three waves.

bosses.name: Flying Dragon Agheel
bosses.description: A feared-by-most massive dragon located within the Dragon-Burnt Ruins in Limgrave

bosses.name: Fire Giant
bosses.description: Upon realizing the flames of their forge would never die, Queen Marika, marked him with a curse. "O trifling giant, mayest thou tend thy, flame for eternity.

bosses.name: Flying Dragon Greyll
bosses.description: A large grey dragon, Flying Dragon Greyll patrols the bridge breathing fire and flying down on those trying to cross.

bosses.name: Frenzied Duelist
bosses.description: A humanoid with heavy armor and a massive axe.

bosses.name: God-devouring Serpent
bosses.description: A massive, menacing reptile that poses a remarkable threat.

bosses.name: Glintstone Dragon Smarag
bosses.description: A fearsome magic dragon with crystalized magic stone for scales. Jealously guards the entrance to the Academy's Crystal Cave.

bosses.name: Glintstone Dragon Adula
bosses.description: A powerful and devastating dragon, a menace for all type of fighters.

bosses.name: Godefroy The Grafted
bosses.description: A member of Godrick the Grafted's family imprisoned by the Dragon Knight during the War of the Shattering.

weapons.name: Hand Axe
weapons.description: Commonly known as a hatchet, this smaller variety of axe is an everyday work tool. Despite its short reach, it is easy to handle, exceling in successive attacks.

weapons.name: Jawbone Axe
weapons.description: Axe made from a herbivore's skull. Weapon of the ancestral followers who disdain metal. This axe is more of a bludgeon; it forgoes a bladed edge, instead using the beast's molar teeth to buffet foes, dealing strike damage.

weapons.name: Forked Hatchet
weapons.description: Peculiar hatchet wielded by imps. The gently undulating forked blade is known as an "imp's tongue" and causes blood loss.

weapons.name: Iron Cleaver
weapons.description: Fairly large iron cleaver, commonly used by the maltreated Misbegotten.  Steeped in resentment, these weapons are swung wildly and relentlessly, often after rushing up to foes.

weapons.name: Battle Axe
weapons.description: A thick, heavy blade attached to a handle. A versatile, standard weapon Capable of powerful attacks thanks to the weighty blade, these weapons are also regarded for their powerful charge attacks.

weapons.name: Ripple Blade
weapons.description: Unique weapon wielded by young Albinaurics, this sword is modelled after the ripples that are thought to be the origin of their species. Its attack power is greatly enhanced with one's arcane attribute.

weapons.name: Icerind Hatchet
weapons.description: A hatchet with a frost-coated blade. One of several gifts given by Castle Sol in the distant north. Known as "freezing fog," the blade is thought to be a dragon's scale. Inflicts a powerful frost effect.

weapons.name: Sacrificial Axe
weapons.description: Hatchet used in ancient sacrificial rite. A Deathbird is depicted as a malevolent deity. The power of the rite yet lingers. A small amount of FP is restored upon slaying a foe.

weapons.name: Celebrant's Cleaver
weapons.description: Cleaver decorated with many-colored fabrics. Ceremonial tool used by dancers during the festivities of Dominula, Windmill Village. Crafted from human bone. Grants trace amounts of runes upon landing attacks.

weapons.name: Rosus' Axe
weapons.description: Usher of Death, Rosus, who shows the path to the catacombs throughout the Lands Between, is depicted on this ritual axe. The dead easily lose their way, and have always been in sore need i of a guiding hand.

weapons.name: Highland Axe
weapons.description: Single-sided axe used by the warriors of the highlands.  Brave combatants begin battle by crying out their names. Roars are enhanced by this weapon.

weapons.name: Warped Axe
weapons.description: Oversized double-headed axe with a bizarre, almost melted appearance. Brute strength is the only thing required to wield this weapon, which appears to have taken quite the beating itself.

weapons.name: Stormhawk Axe
weapons.description: Battle axe designed to resemble a hawk, wioth its wings comprising the blade. Signature weapon of warriors who strive to remain one with the storm, despite being so far from their place of birth. Their hearts are proud, and thereby easily undone.

weapons.name: Gargoyle's Black Axe
weapons.description: Bronze greataxe wielded by Valiant Gargoyle, mended with blackened corpse wax. Deals holy damage. Such is the mark of those who serve Maliketh, the Black Blade.

weapons.name: Hand Ballista
weapons.description: An unconventional ballistic device modeled on a weapon used to besiege castles. Only capable of firing greatbolts.  Perfect for reckless acts such as storming a castle on facing an entire army alone.

weapons.name: Jar Cannon
weapons.description: Jar cannon which uses explosives to fire greatbolts. Deals great damage but is slow to reload.  Experimental firearm brought to the assault on Volcano Manor, where it was discovered that no one knew how to use it.

weapons.name: Longbow
weapons.description: Longbow made to fire arrows over great distances. Compared to a shortbow, arrows fired reach further and deal more damage. To use a bow, arrows must also be equipped.

weapons.name: Albinauric Bow
weapons.description: Longbow featuring delicate silverwork. Wielded by Albinauric wolfback archers. This bow requires dexterity over strength to master.

weapons.name: Erdtree Bow
weapons.description: Longbow featuring Erdtree styling. In times of old, when faith and battle went hand in hand, this weapon was created in tandem with the Golden Arrow. Scales all arrow damage with faith, revealing its true worth when used with holy-infused arrows.

weapons.name: Horn Bow
weapons.description: Longbow made from animal horn. Wielded by the master hunters of the ancestral followers.  Imbues arrows fired with magic damage. Reveals its true worth when used magic-infused arrows.

weapons.name: Serpent Bow
weapons.description: Malformed bow in the shape of a pair of poisonous snakes. Imbues arrows with poison through pagan magic, revealing its true worth when used with poison-infused arrows. Used by assassins known as the Formless Serpents.

weapons.name: Pulley Bow
weapons.description: Longbow which utilizes a series of pulleys and strings. The complex mechanism, which required advanced mathematical and mechanical understanding to craft, was likely made by a certain genius who learned Golden Order Fundamentalism.  Enhances precision while shooting, enabling arrows to fly much further distances.

weapons.name: Black Bow
weapons.description: Longbow carved from black wood to resemble a blade. One of the most difficult bows to master. The blade-like body of the bow is light and cuts through the air. Though a longbow, it can be wielded similarly to a shortbow.

weapons.name: Bloodhound Claws
weapons.description: Large curved claws used by Bloodhound Knights. The curve allows the weapon to slip through an enemy's guard.

weapons.name: Venomous Fang
weapons.description: One of the weapons designed for gladiatorial combat. Used by duelists who were exiled from the colosseum. The black fang protruding from the bronze snake head is coated in deadly poison.

weapons.name: Hookclaws
weapons.description: Weapon worn on the fist comprised of sharp parallel blades favored by those who lurk in the dark. Lacerations cause blood loss with great effect.  Claw weapons come in pairs, and two-handing this weapon will equip it to both hands.

weapons.name: Raptor Talons
weapons.description: Claw comprised of two sharp, thin blades, wielded by the assassins of Ravenmount, this weapon allows them to imitate the attacks of Deathbirds. Besides excelling at airborne attacks, its charge attack mimics the vicious swoop of a bird of prey.

weapons.name: Watchdog's Greatsword
weapons.description: Stone greatsword wielded by Erdtree Burial Watchdogs. Though decorated with the watchman's eye, the pupil was taken by graverobbers and is now hollow, leaving this sword a mere lump of stone.

weapons.name: Greatsword
weapons.description: A coarse iron lump of an ultra greatsword. Mows down foes by utilizing its incredible weight. Though handling it likely requires the wielder to have surpassed the realm of the merely human, it is precisely for this reason the weapon is used to slaughter even inhuman foes.

weapons.name: Troll's Golden Sword
weapons.description: Sword given to the giants who fought for the Erdtree during the War against the Giants long ago. Though the giants have lost their minds, they stay inseparable from their swords that are in sad shape—such that the gold plating had flaked away.

weapons.name: Maliketh's Black Blade
weapons.description: Maliketh's black blade which once harbored the power of the Rune of Death. A sad shadow of its former glory. After a fragment of Death was stolen on that fateful night, Maliketh bound the blade within his own flesh, such that none might ever rob Death again.

weapons.name: Zweihander
weapons.description: Just about the largest sword a mere man is capable of swinging. True to its name, it is designed to be wielded in both hands, but those of merely ordinary strength will still struggle to do so. The long blade is heavy and sharp, sending foes reeling back with its broader strokes, while also capable of a devastating piercing thrust.

weapons.name: Royal Greatsword
weapons.description: Greatsword decorated in royal Carian Style. Favored weapon of Blaidd the Half-Wolf. In defiance of the fate he was born to, Blaidd swore to serve no master but Ranni. As proof. the sword was imbued with a cold magic at the moment oath was sworn.

weapons.name: Godslayer's Greatsword
weapons.description: Sacred sword of the Dusk-Eyed Queen who controlled the Godskin Apostles before her defeat at the hands of Maliketh. The black flames wielded by the apostles are channeled from this sword.

weapons.name: Grafted Blade Greatsword
weapons.description: The storied sword of Castle Morne. A revenger's weapon, it is burdened with oceans of anger and regret.  One of the legendary armaments.  A lone surviving champion from a country now vanished was so determined to continue fighting that he claimed the swords of an entire clan of warriors.

weapons.name: Ruins Greatsword
weapons.description: Originally rubble from a ruin which fell from the sky, this surviving fragment was honed into a weapon. One of the legendary armaments. The ruin it came from crumbled when struck by a meteorite, as such this weapon harbords its destructive power.

weapons.name: Starscourge Greatsword
weapons.description: Curved greatswords of black steel wielded by General Radahn. A pair of weapons decorated with a lion mane motif. Radahn earned considerable renown as the Starscourge in this youth, and it is said that it was during this time he engraved the gravity crest up these blades.

weapons.name: Troll Knight's Sword
weapons.description: Greatsword embedded with a blue glintstone. Weapon of the trolls in service to the royal family of Caria. Called into service when the Queen invoked an oath they swore, the trolls are treated as true knights of Caria, and fight arm in arm with their human comrades.

weapons.name: Watchdog's Staff
weapons.description: Large stone staff embedded with glintstone. Wielded by Erdtree Burial Watchdogs who protect catacombs. The Watchdogs, battered and broken over their lengthy tenure, rule the catacombs and are even said to command the imps. Unique Skill: Sorcery of the Crozier Channel magic into the glintstone to activate an ancient sorcery, producing floating magic projectiles that chase enemies automatically.

weapons.name: Envoy's Greathorn
weapons.description: Fanned golden horn of the Oracle Envoys. Profoundly weighty, its blows are sure to be felt. Originally an instrument, but one that cannot be sounded by a mere human. Or perhaps it is too early to sound the call.

weapons.name: Great Club
weapons.description: An enormous club of hardwood. Wildly hammering foes with this striking weapon requires no dexterity; only brute force. While it may seem sacrilegious, this weapon is said to be a withered branch of the Erdtree. Imbued with holy power, this weapon will never snap.

weapons.name: Prelate's Inferno Crozier
weapons.description: Colossal hammer with the appearance of roiling flames. Weapon of the Prelates who lead the Fire Monks. Its heft represents the weight of their guardianship.  The hammer's head is unusually substantial, and strong attacks' will fling foes into the air.

weapons.name: Duelist Greataxe
weapons.description: Greataxe designed for gladiatorial combat. Used by duelists who were exiled from the colosseum. A weapon reserved for duelist champions, the charge attack is particularly ferocious.

weapons.name: Axe Of Godfrey
weapons.description: Weapon of Godfrey, Elden Lord. It was broken in a battle fought as leader of the Tarnished during the Long March. This weapon is symbolic of Godfrey's vow to conduct himself as a lord, later becoming an emblem of the golden lineage. In the days of the past, a crown was warranted with strength.

weapons.name: Dragon Greatclaw
weapons.description: Weapon said to have been whittled from the claw of a great, ancient dragon, wielded by grotesque Tree Sentinels who yet serve the Erdtree. The claw is enwreathed with lightning,and tears through the dragons' feeble descendants with ease.

weapons.name: Fallingstar Beast Jaw
weapons.description: Part of a Falling star Beast's jaw, hard and shining black, fashioned into a weapon.  With its sharp point, this colossal weapon can skewer foes.

weapons.name: Staff Of The Avatar
weapons.description: Ceremonial staff depicting the Erdtree in its historic radiance. Wielded by the avatars who protect the Minor Erdtrees. The avatars, emerging in the wake of the Elden Ring's shattering, were determined to protect the withering Erdtree's offspring.

weapons.name: Ghiza's Wheel
weapons.description: Great iron wheel lined with flesh-flaying blades. Device of torture used by Inquisitor Ghiza. As the wheel spins it causes severe pain and blood loss. The design was adopted for use as the iconic weapon wielded by Iron Virgins.

weapons.name: Giant-crusher
weapons.description: A hammer made from a boulder, used in the War against the Giants. One of the heftiest weapons in the entire Lands Between. After the giants were quelled, and man turned against man in violence, this weapon was all but forgotten. Man has grown feeble in comparison to his forebears.

weapons.name: Golem's Halberd
weapons.description: A great halberd of black stone crafted by a civilization now gone to ruin. Wielded by the Guardian Golem.

weapons.name: Troll's Hammer
weapons.description: Mining tool of stonedigger trolls used to crack bedrock.  Trolls are descended form the giants, and these were supposedly once used as ceremonial smithing tools. In the distance past, smithing was considered divine.

weapons.name: Rotten Staff
weapons.description: Ceremonial staff depicting the Erdtree in its historic radiance. It festers with scarlet rot. Wielded by the avatars who protect the Minor Erdtrees.

weapons.name: Rotten Greataxe
weapons.description: Greataxe designed for gladiatorial combat, now festering with scarlet rot. Used by duelists who were exiled from the colosseum.

weapons.name: Soldier's Crossbow
weapons.description: A crossbow of simple make, usable by anyone, but lacking in both power and accuracy. Bolts must be equipped to use a crossbow.

weapons.name: Light Crossbow
weapons.description: Ranged weapoon made from a bow fixed to a stock. Deals good damage and is simple to use, but requires reloading after firing. Bolts must be equipped to use a crossbow.

weapons.name: Heavy Crossbow
weapons.description: Heavy crossbow with iron limbs, increasing damage dealt. Commonly employed in the Shattering.

weapons.name: Pulley Crossbow
weapons.description: Crossbow made with pulleys and power springs. The complex mechanism, which required advanced mathematical and mechanical understanding to craft, was likely made by a certain genius who learned Golden Order fundamentalism.   One touch fires a volley of bolts. Be warned; large stores of bolts can be quickly spent.

weapons.name: Full Moon Crossbow
weapons.description: One-of-a-kind enchanted crossbow of exquisitely detailed craftsmanship. Made to celebrate the matrimonial union, and reconciliation, between the houses of the Erdtree and the Full Moon, Leyndell and Raya Lucaria. The two rings dance when reloading the weapon. Reveals true worth when used with holy- infused bolts.

weapons.name: Onyx Lord's Greatsword
weapons.description: Greatsword forged from golden-hued meteoric ore.  The blade conceals gravity-manipulating magic. A weapon unique to the Onyx Lords, a race of ancients with skin of stone who were said to have risen to life when a meteor struck long ago.

weapons.name: Crepus's Black-key Crossbow
weapons.description: Black crossbow featuring a long stock. Used for sniping, it has a very long range. Weapon of Crepus, who served the Two Fingers from the shadows of the Roundtable as the head confessor.

weapons.name: Arbalest
weapons.description: Large crossbow made from composite materials. One of the largest of all bolt.firing devices. Its limbs are more pliable than metallic ones, allowing bolts fired from this weapon to pierce even forged of steel.

weapons.name: Bloodhound's Fang
weapons.description: Curved greatsword with a gently undulating blade wielded by Bloodhound Knights. A fearsome blade capable of brutal airborne attacks.

weapons.name: Dismounter
weapons.description: This curved greatsword wielded by the brawny sellswords of Kaiden combines the blades of a scimitar with the heft of a hatchet.  A difficult to handle weapon that demands much of the wielder's strength and dexterity, but with practice and ability, it can serve as a versatile weapon even on horseback.

weapons.name: Magma Wyrm's Scalesword
weapons.description: Curved greatsword wielded by Magma Wyrms. The shape resembles a dragon's jaw and is covered in hard scales. It's said these land-bound dragons were once humans heroes who partook in dragon communication, a grave transgression for which they were cursed to crawl the earth upon their bellies, shadows of their former selves.

weapons.name: Omen Cleaver
weapons.description: Heavy-bladed curved sword of colossal size awarded to Omen as a tool of war. This weapon is made to take advantage of brute strength.  The pattern etched upon the blade is the remnant of a deteriorating malediction. Indeed, when bestowing a weapon, preparations must be made for taking it away.

weapons.name: Zamor Curved Sword
weapons.description: Weapon wielded by the knights of Zamor who earned great renown during the War against the Giants. In apparent devotion to winter, the curved blade is styled after an icy wind and imbued with a powerful frost effect.

weapons.name: Monk's Flameblade
weapons.description: Curved sword with a flickering flame motif. Wielded by the Fire Monks who came from the Mountaintops of the Giants. The monks came to the land of Liurnia in pursuit of a fugitive who stole their fire.

weapons.name: Beastman's Cleaver
weapons.description: Curved greatsword of colossal size forged of dull iron and wielded by the beastmen of Farum Azula. The blade is incredibly heavy, but well-balanced. Comparatively easy to wield for the damage it delivers. It's clear the beastmen possess knowledge beyond human ken.

weapons.name: Morgott's Cursed Sword
weapons.description: Warped blade of shifting hue used by Morgott, the Omen King.  The accused blood that Morgott recanted and sealed away reformed into this blade.

weapons.name: Falchion
weapons.description: A curved sword with a single-sided blade. Delivers slashing attacks with its sharp blade, but is ineffective against thick armor and hides covered in tough scales. Wielders of the weapon employ a unique style that enhances attacks with spinning motions.

weapons.name: Shamshir
weapons.description: Curved sword with a thin blade of ample length. Light of weight despite its larger size, its slicing attacks come in rapid succession. A devastatingly powerful weapon in the hands of a skilled swordsman.

weapons.name: Beastman's Curved Sword
weapons.description: Curved sword forged of dull iron wielded by the beastmen of Farum Azula. The blade is heavy but well-balanced. Comparatively easy to wield for the damage it delivers.

weapons.name: Shotel
weapons.description: Curved sword with a severely hooked blade. Its attacks can slip through an enemy's guard.  Made to hunt down humans, this weapon requires high dexterity to wield efficiently.

weapons.name: Magma Blade
weapons.description: Curved sword with a blade fashioned from the lava of Mt. Gelmir. An armament of the man-serpents, impossible for a human to have made. Deals fire damage.

weapons.name: Flowing Curved Sword
weapons.description: Legends speak of a master of the sword garbed in blue, and his curved blade that was patterned after flowing water. Strong attack unleashes a series of strikes akin to a dance, offering a glimpse into the legend. Skill: Spinning Slash Skill favored by dexterous warriors. Slash foes as your body spins. Additional input allows for a follow-up attack.

weapons.name: Wing Of Astel
weapons.description: Sword fashioned from a delicate wing, suffused with the magic of the stars. Strong attack unleashes a wave of enchanted light. Crafted from a relic of the Naturalborn of the Void who is said to have assailed the Eternal City.

weapons.name: Eclipse Shotel
weapons.description: Storied sword and treasure of Castle Sol that depicts an eclipsed sun drained of color. One of the legendary armaments. In Sol, the sight of an eclipse inspires a dreadful awe, preventing an onlooker from averting his gaze.

weapons.name: Serpent-god's Curved Sword
weapons.description: Curved sword fashioned in the image of an ancient serpent deity and tool of a forgotten religion practiced on Mt. Gelmir. Formerly used to offer up sacrifices, this sword restores HP upon slaying an enemy.

weapons.name: Scavenger's Curved Sword
weapons.description: Unique curved sword, notched like shark's teeth. Weapon carried by corpse pillagers who prowl the sites of old battles. The blade is tacky with blood and covered in hefty nicks, making it totally uneven. Life can be sinister indeed.

weapons.name: Mantis Blade
weapons.description: A curved sword with a blade at both ends wielded by the Cemetery Shades, the insect-ridden grave keepers.  The blade is thin and sharp, and strong attack unleashes a far-reaching slash.

classes.name: Hero
classes.description: A stalwart Hero, at home with a battleaxe, descended from a badlands chieftain

classes.name: Warrior
classes.description: A twinblade wielding warrior from a nomadic tribe. An origin of exceptional technique

classes.name: Astrologer
classes.description: A scholar who reads fate in the stars. Heir to the school of glintstone sorcery

classes.name: Bandit
classes.description: A dangerous bandit who strikes for weak points. Excels at ranged combat with bows

classes.name: Prisoner
classes.description: A prisoner bound in an iron mask. Studied in glintstone sorcery, having lived among the elite prior to sentencing.

classes.name: Vagabond
classes.description: A knight exiled from their homeland to wander. A solid, armor-clad origin.

classes.name: Confessor
classes.description: A church spy adept at covert operations. Equally adept with a sword as they are with incantations

classes.name: Wretch
classes.description: A poor purposeless osd naked as they day they were born. A nice club is all they have

classes.name: Prophet
classes.description: A seer ostracized for inauspicious prophecies. Well versed in healing incantations

classes.name: Samurai
classes.description: A capable fighter from the distant land of reeds. Handy with Katana and Longbows

classes.name: Warrior
classes.description: A twinblade wielding warrior from a nomadic tribe. An origin of exceptional technique

classes.name: Enchanted Knight
classes.description: These Knights have embraced the power of Glintstone, facing enemies in melee combat while simultaneously casting spells. They often seek out and destroy those who use magic for nefarious purposes.

classes.name: Bloody Wolf
classes.description: The Wolf is cunning, steadfast and deadly. These warriors have no fear and face down death with unmatched vigor and pride.

classes.name: Champion
classes.description: Equipped with a Sacred Seal and an Axe, the Champion can burn foes from a distance or take them head on in melee combat. They are ferocious fighters, who do not fear death.

sorceries.name: Briars Of Punishment
sorceries.description: An aberrant sorcery discovered by exiled criminals. Theirs are the sorceries most reviled by the academy. Wounds the caster with thorns of sin, sending a trail of bloodthorns running over the ground to impale enemies from below. This sorcery can be cast repeatedly. The guilty, their eyes gouged by thorns, lived in eternal darkness. There, they discovered the blood star.
sorceries.effects: Wounds caster to unleash trail of bloodthrorns

sorceries.name: Ancient Death Rancor
sorceries.description: Sorcery of the servants of Death.
sorceries.effects: Summons horde of vengeful spirits that chase down foes

sorceries.name: Briars Of Sin
sorceries.description: An aberrant sorcery, discovered along with red glintstone by those exiled to the north for their crimes. Summons large thorns from a whorl of blood shed by one's own hand in penance for sins. This sorcery can be cast repeatedly. The Academy reviles this sorcery, which draws its power from faith.
sorceries.effects: Summons thorns from a whorl of your own blood.

sorceries.name: Cannon Of Haima
sorceries.description: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria. Lobs an explosive magic projectile that flies in an arc. Charging enhances potency. Drawn from the conspectus of Haima, the adjudicator of the academy, this sorcery employs might as a means to quell conflict.
sorceries.effects: Lobs an explosive magic projectile in an arc

sorceries.name: Ambush Shard
sorceries.description: One of the night sorceries of Sellia, Town of Sorcery. Launches a projectile from a distance removed from the caster, so as to strike the enemy from behind. This sorcery can be cast repeatedly. The Sellian sorcerers were assassins, and it is said that they often hunted their fellows.
sorceries.effects: Strikes from behind with projectile fired from distance

sorceries.name: Carian Phalanx
sorceries.description: One of the sorceries of the Carian royal family.
sorceries.effects: Forms a defensive arch of numerous magic glintblades

sorceries.name: Adula's Moonblade
sorceries.description: Sorcery of Adula, the Glintstone Dragon. Conjures a cold magic greatsword, then delivers a sweeping blow that launches a blade-like projectile of frost. This sorcery can be cast repeatedly. Adula, a devourer of sorcerers, was bested by Ranni and subsequently swore a knightly oath to her Dark Moon.
sorceries.effects: Sweeping slash followed by cold blade projectile

sorceries.name: Carian Greatsword
sorceries.description: One of the sorceries of the Carian royal family. Conjures a magic greatsword and then delivers a sweeping blow. This sorcery can be cast repeatedly. Armed with this spell, sorcerers gain the strength of knights, their loyalty sworn to the moon.
sorceries.effects: Performs sweeping slash using magical greatsword

sorceries.name: Carian Piercer
sorceries.description: One of the sorceries of the Carian royal family.
sorceries.effects: Impales foes with magical greatsword

sorceries.name: Carian Retaliation
sorceries.description: One of the sorceries of the Carian royal family.
sorceries.effects: Dispels enemy spells and retaliates with glintblades

sorceries.name: Carian Slicer
sorceries.description: One of the sorceries of the Carian royal family.
sorceries.effects: Performs swift sweeping slash using magical sword

sorceries.name: Crystal Barrage
sorceries.description: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria.
sorceries.effects: Fires a volley of glintstone crystal shards

sorceries.name: Collapsing Stars
sorceries.description: One of the glintstone sorceries that manipulates gravitational forces.
sorceries.effects: Pulls foes toward caster with gravity projectile volley

sorceries.name: Comet Azur
sorceries.description: Legendary sorcery devised by Azur, primeval sorcerer. Fires a tremendous comet in a torrent akin to the distant starry expanse, the place said to be the origin of glintstone. Hold to continue releasing the sorcery's power. When Azur glimpsed into the primeval current, he saw darkness. He was left both bewitched and fearful of the abyss.
sorceries.effects: Fires a tremendous comet within a starry torrent

sorceries.name: Crystal Burst
sorceries.description: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria. Fires a burst of glintstone crystal shards. This sorcery can be cast repeatedly and while in motion. Charging increases potency. A sorcery of the Crystal Cadre, a group of sorcerers who pursued the wisdom of stone - the secrets locked in the faint cogitation of the Crystalians.
sorceries.effects: Fires a burst of glintstone crystal shards

sorceries.name: Comet
sorceries.description: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria. Fires a great magical comet. This sorcery can be cast repeatedly and while in motion. Charging enhances potency. The greatest of the Karolos Conspectus's sorceries, that only a very few sorcerers have ever mastered.
sorceries.effects: Fires a great magic comet

sorceries.name: Crystal Torrent
sorceries.description: Sorcery of the mysterious Crystalians.
sorceries.effects: Creates crystal mass that fires stream of crystal shards

sorceries.name: Crystal Release
sorceries.description: Sorcery of the mysterious Crystalians. Creates a mass of crystal, then shatters it to scour a wide area with a violent rain of crystal shards. This sorcery is used by high-ranking adepts among the Crystalians. Some also call this sorcery "the Crystal Sun."
sorceries.effects: Scours area with violent rain of crystal shards

sorceries.name: Fia's Mist
sorceries.description: Sorcery of Fia, the Deathbed Companion. Creates a deathly mist before the caster, which inflicts Death blight upon those who enter. This sorcery can be cast while in motion. Charging enhances range of the mist. This sorcery was developed to oppose the Roundtable Hold, and is effective only against the Tarnished.
sorceries.effects: Release a mist of death before caster

sorceries.name: Eternal Darkness
sorceries.description: Forbidden sorcery of Sellia, Town of Sorcery.
sorceries.effects: Creates a dark space that draws in spells

sorceries.name: Frozen Armament
sorceries.description: Sorcery said to have been used by the old snow witch. Enchants armament held in the right hand with frost. This sorcery can be cast while in motion. The snowy crone taught the young Ranni to fear the dark moon as she imparted her cold sorcery.
sorceries.effects: Enchants right-hand armament with frost

sorceries.name: Founding Rain Of Stars
sorceries.description: The eldest primeval sorcery, said to have been discovered by an
sorceries.effects: Releases a downpour of star rain for a while

sorceries.name: Explosive Ghostflame
sorceries.description: Sorcery of the servants of Death.
sorceries.effects: Causes ghostflame explosion that burns wide area

sorceries.name: Freezing Mist
sorceries.description: Sorcery said to have been used by the old snow witch.
sorceries.effects: Releases cold mist before caster

sorceries.name: Gelmir's Fury
sorceries.description: One of the sorceries developed from the magma of Mt. Gelmir.
sorceries.effects: Covers area with surge of magma from the earth

sorceries.name: Gavel Of Haima
sorceries.description: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria. Creates a magical greathammer and slams it down. Allows one follow-up attack. Drawn from the scholarly conspectus of Haima, the adjudicator of the academy, this sorcery employs might as a means to quell conflict.
sorceries.effects: Attacks using a magic greathammer

sorceries.name: Glintstone Arc
sorceries.description: Fires a horizontal arc of magic that spreads outward. This sorcery can be cast repeteadly and while in motion.
sorceries.effects: Fires a horizontally-widening magic arc

sorceries.name: Glintstone Cometshard
sorceries.description: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria. Fires a magical comet with a trailing tail. This sorcery can be cast repeatedly and while in motion. Charging enhances potency. A sorcery of the Karolos Conspectus, the most venerable of the academy.
sorceries.effects: Fires a magic comet with a trailing tail

sorceries.name: Glintstone Pebble
sorceries.description: The most basic glintstone sorcery of the Academy of Raya Lucaria.
sorceries.effects: Fires magic projectiles from glintstone

sorceries.name: Glintstone Stars
sorceries.description: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria.
sorceries.effects: Fires three shooting stars that pursue foes

sorceries.name: Glintstone Icecrag
sorceries.description: Sorcery said to have been used by the old snow witch.
sorceries.effects: Fires mass of cold magic from glintstone

sorceries.name: Glintblade Phalanx
sorceries.description: One of the sorceries of the Carian royal family.
sorceries.effects: Forms a defensive arch of magic glintblades

sorceries.name: Gravity Well
sorceries.description: One of the glintstone sorceries that manipulates gravitational forces. Fires a projectile of condensed gravitational force. Those struck by it will be pulled toward the caster. Charging enhances potency. A gravitational technique studied by the young Radahn. His master was an Alabaster Lord with skin of stone.
sorceries.effects: Pulls foes toward caster with gravity projectile

sorceries.name: Great Glintstone Shard
sorceries.description: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria. The glintstone serves as a conduit, launching large magical projectiles at foes. This sorcery can be cast repeatedly and while in motion. Those unworthy of the stone crown typically end their brief journey into sorcery here.
sorceries.effects: Fires larger magic projectiles from glintstone

sorceries.name: Lucidity
sorceries.description: One of the sorceries of the Carian royal family.
sorceries.effects: Alleviates buildup of sleep and madness

sorceries.name: Greatblade Phalanx
sorceries.description: One of the sorceries of the Carian royal family. Creates a defensive arch of larger magic glintblades overhead, which automatically attack nearby foes. Used by the enchanted troll knights. They were the comrades of the young Rennala, bound by oath.
sorceries.effects: Forms a defensive arch of larger magic glintblades

sorceries.name: Great Oracular Bubble
sorceries.description: Sorcery of the claymen who served as priests in the ancient
sorceries.effects: Launches a large magic bubble

sorceries.name: Oracle Bubble
sorceries.description: Sorcery of the claymen who served as priests in the ancient dynasty.
sorceries.effects: Launches several bubbles of magic.

sorceries.name: Loretta's Greatbow
sorceries.description: Sorcery used by Royal Knight Loretta. Creates a magic greatbow and fires a great arrow. Charging enhances potency. Hold to keep the great arrow nocked. It is said that the bow was Loretta's favored weapon.
sorceries.effects: Fires great arrow from a magic greatbow

sorceries.name: Loretta's Mastery
sorceries.description: Sorcery used by Loretta, Knight of the Haligtree. Creates a magic greatbow and fires four great arrows simultaneously. Charging enhances potency. Hold to keep the great arrows nocked. Developed by Loretta after her long, bloody journey to seek out a place where the Albinaurics could live in peace.
sorceries.effects: Fires four great arrow from a magic greatbow at once

sorceries.name: Magic Downpour
sorceries.description: One of the sorceries of the Carian royal family.
sorceries.effects: Summon a magic mass that sprays projectiles over area

sorceries.name: Magic Glintblade
sorceries.description: An old sorcery of the Carian Royal Family.
sorceries.effects: Creates sigil that forms a projectile glintblade after delay

sorceries.name: Magma Shot
sorceries.description: One of the sorceries developed from the magma of Mt. Gelmir.
sorceries.effects: Fire lump of magma that explodes on contact

sorceries.name: Meteorite
sorceries.description: A glintstone sorcery that draws on gravitational force, used by a great white king with stone skin. Calls small meteorites down from the sky. The meteor shower continues for as long as the sorcery is in effect. It is said that, in the Eternal City, now lost in ruin underground, meteorites held the same import as stars.
sorceries.effects: Calls small meteors down from the sky.

sorceries.name: Night Comet
sorceries.description: One of the night sorceries of Sellia, Town of Sorcery.
sorceries.effects: Fires semi-invisible magic comet

sorceries.name: Meteorite Of Astel
sorceries.description: One of the glintstone sorceries that manipulates gravitational forces. Summons a void that emits a hail of meteorites. Hold to continue the effect. A manifestation of the power with which Astel leveled the Eternal City.
sorceries.effects: Calls a hail of small meteorites from the void.

sorceries.name: Night Shard
sorceries.description: One of the night sorceries of Sellia, Town of Sorcery.
sorceries.effects: Swiftly fires a semi-invisible

sorceries.name: Night Maiden's Mist
sorceries.description: One of the night sorceries of Sellia, Town of Sorcery.
sorceries.effects: Releases life-sapping silver mist before caster

sorceries.name: Rancorcall
sorceries.description: Sorcery of the servants of Death.
sorceries.effects: Summons vengeful spirits that chase down foes

sorceries.name: Oracle Bubbles
sorceries.description: Sorcery of the claymen who served as priests in the ancient
sorceries.effects: Launches several small magic bubbles.

sorceries.name: Rennala's Full Moon
sorceries.description: Sorcery associated with the Carian queen. Uses the caster as a vessel to incarnate a full moon, then sends it floating toward foes. The full moon dispels all sorcery that touches it, and temporarily reduces magic damage negation for those it strikes. Queen Rennala encountered this enchanting moon when she was young, and later, it would bewitch the academy.
sorceries.effects: Incarnate a full moon and launch it at foes

sorceries.name: Ranni's Dark Moon
sorceries.description: Legendary sorcery associated with the Carian queen.
sorceries.effects: Incarnate a cold, dark moon and launch it at foes.

sorceries.name: Rock Blaster
sorceries.description: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria.
sorceries.effects: Thurst staff into ground to emit a massive shockwave

sorceries.name: Roiling Magma
sorceries.description: One of the sorceries developed from the magma of Mt. Gelmir. Fires a lump of condensed magma that explodes a short delay after hitting the target. Charging enhances potency and further delays the explosion. After discovering the ancient hexes of Gelmir, Rykard, son of Queen Rennala, brought them back into practical use as new forms of sorcery.
sorceries.effects: Fires lump of magma that explodes after delay

sorceries.name: Rykard's Rancor
sorceries.description: The terrible power of Rykard, Lord of Blasphemy.
sorceries.effects: Releases searing spirits that repeatedly explode after delay

sorceries.name: Rock Sling
sorceries.description: One of the glintstone sorceries that manipulates gravitational forces.
sorceries.effects: Summons rocks from the earth and sends its flying

sorceries.name: Scholar's Armament
sorceries.description: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria.
sorceries.effects: Enchants right-hand armament with magic damage

sorceries.name: Scholar's Shield
sorceries.description: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria.
sorceries.effects: Enhances left-handed shield damage negation

sorceries.name: Shard Spiral
sorceries.description: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria.
sorceries.effects: Fire twin spiraling projectiles

sorceries.name: Shatter Earth
sorceries.description: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria. Imbues the ferrule of the caster's staff with magic, then thrusts it into the ground to create a magical shockwave. Allows one follow-up attack. A Stonedigger sorcery used by the glintstone miners of the crystal tunnel. At the academy, use of this sorcery was a stigma that marked out failed scholars.
sorceries.effects: Thrust staff into ground to emit a shockwave

sorceries.name: Starlight
sorceries.description: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria.
sorceries.effects: Creates star light to illuminate surroundings

sorceries.name: Star Shower
sorceries.description: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria. Fires six magic shooting stars that pursue the target. This sorcery can be cast while in motion. Charging enhances potency. The most difficult to master of the Olivinus Conspectus sorceries.
sorceries.effects: Fires six shooting stars that pursue foes

sorceries.name: Stars Of Ruin
sorceries.description: Legendary sorcery devised by Lusat, primeval sorcerers.
sorceries.effects: Fire twelve dark shooting stars that pursue foes

sorceries.name: Shattering Crystal
sorceries.description: Sorcery of the mysterious Crystalians. Creates a mass of crystal, then shatters it in a forward burst. Charging enhances potency. The Crystalians are inorganic beings, yet they live. They cleave close to the ideals of the primeval current, and as such, they are revered guests of the sorcerers.
sorceries.effects: Creates crystal mass that shatters in forward burst

sorceries.name: Swift Glintstone Shard
sorceries.description: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria. The glintstone serves as a conduit, launching swift magical projectiles at foes. This sorcery can be used without delay after performing another action. Those unworthy of the stone crown typically end their brief journey into sorcery here.
sorceries.effects: Swiftly fires magic projectiles from glintstone

sorceries.name: Terra Magicus
sorceries.description: One of the glintstone sorceries of the Academy of Raya Lucaria. Draws an academy sigil upon the ground, raising the magic strength of those within. Once, the sigil would be cast from the highest belfry of the academy, covering the entire institution's grounds. This spell allows such vivid experience of spell—casting success, it turns many a fledgling into a true sorcerer in a flash of newfound understanding.
sorceries.effects: Raises the magic strength of those within the sigil

sorceries.name: Unseen Blade
sorceries.description: One of the night sorceries of Sellia, Town of Sorcery. Enchants armament held in right hand, making it completely invisible. This sorcery can be cast while in motion. Used by Sellian assassins to present themselves as unarmed sorcerers.
sorceries.effects: Makes right-hand armament completely invisible

sorceries.name: Unseen Form
sorceries.description: One of the night sorceries of Sellia, Town of Sorcery. Makes the caster semi-invisible. While on horseback, effect extends to cover the mount. This sorcery can be cast while in motion. The Sellian assassins considered every option that aided their dirty work.
sorceries.effects: Makes the caster semi-invisible

sorceries.name: Thops's Barrier
sorceries.description: The lifelong pursuit of Thops the Bluntstone.
sorceries.effects: Erect a magic forcefield to deflect spells

sorceries.name: Zamor Ice Storm
sorceries.description: Ice sorcery of the Town of Zamor.
sorceries.effects: Thrust staff into ground to create freezing tornado.

sorceries.name: Tibia's Summons
sorceries.description: Sorcery of the servants of Death. Summons a group of Those Lost in Death. Three skeletons will appear some distance from the caster and attack foes before disappearing. The dead have long been left to wander; what they need is leadership.
sorceries.effects: Summons Those Who Live in Death

incantations.name: Ancient Dragons' Lightning Strike
incantations.description: A secret incantation of the capital's ancient dragon cult.
incantations.effects: Summons red lightning that spreads from impact

incantations.name: Aspects Of The Crucible: Horns
incantations.description: One of the ancient Erdtree incantations.
incantations.effects: creates shoulder horn to gore foes from a low stance.

incantations.name: Agheel's Flame
incantations.description: Superior incantation of Dragon Communion. Channels the power of the flying dragon Agheel.
incantations.effects: Spews flame breath of Agheel from above

incantations.name: Aspects Of The Crucible: Tail
incantations.description: One of the ancient Erdtree incantations.
incantations.effects: Creates supple tail to sweep area before caster

incantations.name: Barrier Of Gold
incantations.description: One of the incantations of Erdtree Worship.
incantations.effects: Greatly increases magic damage negation for self & allies

incantations.name: Ancient Dragons' Lightning Spear
incantations.description: A secret incantation of the capital's ancient dragon cult.
incantations.effects: Stabs with red lightning spear from above

incantations.name: Beast Claw
incantations.description: Incantation taught by Gurranq, the Beast Clergyman.
incantations.effects: Creates claws that tear through the land.

incantations.name: Aspect Of The Crucible: Breath
incantations.description: One of the ancient Erdtree incantations.
incantations.effects: Creates throat pouch to spew fire while walking

incantations.name: Bestial Constitution
incantations.description: Incantation taught by Gurranq, the Beast Clergyman.
incantations.effects: Alleviates blood loss and frost buildup

incantations.name: Bestial Sling
incantations.description: Incantation taught by Gurranq, the Beast Clergyman. Swiftly flings a number of sharp rock shards. This incantation can be cast without delay after performing another action. It is said that in the time before the Erdtree, stones were the first weapons of the beasts who had gained intelligence.
incantations.effects: Swiftly flings numerous sharp rock shards

incantations.name: Black Blade
incantations.description: Power gleaned from the remembrance of Maliketh.
incantations.effects: Black blade spinning slash that emits wave of light.

incantations.name: Black Flame Ritual
incantations.description: Superior black flame incantation of the Godskin Apostles.
incantations.effects: Summons circle of black flame pillars around caster.

incantations.name: Black Flame
incantations.description: A black flame incantation of the Godskin Apostles.
incantations.effects: Throws a ball of raging black fire

incantations.name: Black Flame Blade
incantations.description: A black flame incantation of the Godskin Apostles.
incantations.effects: Enchants right-hand armament with black flame

incantations.name: Bestial Vitality
incantations.description: Incantation taught by Gurranq, the Beast Clergyman.
incantations.effects: Heals HP over a period of time

incantations.name: Black Flame's Protection
incantations.description: A black flame incantation of the Godskin Apostles.
incantations.effects: Increases phyiscal damage negation

incantations.name: Blessing's Boon
incantations.description: One of the ancient Erdtree incantations.
incantations.effects: Grants blessing to self and nearby allies

incantations.name: Blessing Of The Erdtree
incantations.description: One of the ancient Erdtree incantations
incantations.effects: Grants greater blessing to self and nearby allies

incantations.name: Bloodflame Blade
incantations.description: A Blood Oath incantation, granted by the Lord of Blood. Engulfs armament held in the right hand with bloodflame. This incantation can be cast while in motion. After dealing damage, bloodflame continues to build up onset of blood loss for a very short time.
incantations.effects: Enchants right-hand armament with bloodflame

incantations.name: Bloodflame Talons
incantations.description: A Blood Oath incantation, granted by the Lord of Blood.
incantations.effects: Creates bloodflame lacerations that then explode

incantations.name: Bloodboon
incantations.description: Sacred incantation of Mohg, Lord of Blood.
incantations.effects: Scatters bloodflame before caster to set area aflame.

incantations.name: Borealis's Mist
incantations.description: Superior incantation of Dragon Communion.
incantations.effects: Spews icy breath of Borealis from above

incantations.name: Cure Poison
incantations.description: Incantation of the Two Fingers' faithful.
incantations.effects: Cures Poison ailment and reduces poison build-up.

incantations.name: Burn O Flame!
incantations.description: One of the incantations that draws directly from the power of the
incantations.effects: Raises a series of flame pillars around caster

incantations.name: Darkness
incantations.description: Incantation of the Two Fingers' servants, who once served as the
incantations.effects: Creates area of darkness that conceals caster

incantations.name: Death Lightning
incantations.description: Incantation that channels the power of the ancient dragon
incantations.effects: Strikes surroundings with storm of death lightning

incantations.name: Discus Of Light
incantations.description: One of the incantations of the Golden Order fundamentalists.
incantations.effects: Fires ring of light before the caster

incantations.name: Divine Fortification
incantations.description: Incantation of the Two Fingers' faithful.
incantations.effects: Increases holy damage negation.

incantations.name: Dragonbolt Blessing
incantations.description: Superior incantation of the capital's ancient dragon cult. Summons lightning to bolster the caster's body. Attacks become easier to deflect and resistance to all ailments is increased. However, lightning damage negation will be reduced. Only those loved by dragons can survive the ordeal of cladding their bodies in lightning.
incantations.effects: Bolsters caster's body with lightning

incantations.name: Dragonice
incantations.description: One of the incantations of Dragon Communion.
incantations.effects: Channels dragon to spew icy breath

incantations.name: Dragonclaw
incantations.description: One of the incantations of Dragon Communion.
incantations.effects: Channels dragon to rend foes with dragon claws

incantations.name: Dragonfire
incantations.description: One of the incantations of Dragon Communion.
incantations.effects: Channels dragon to spew flame breath

incantations.name: Dragonmaw
incantations.description: One of the incantations of Dragon Communion.
incantations.effects: Channels dragon to bite foes before caster

incantations.name: Ekzyke's Decay
incantations.description: Superior incantation of Dragon Communion. Channels the power of Ekzykes, the Decaying.
incantations.effects: Spews scarlet rot breath of Ekzykes from above.

incantations.name: Ekzykes's Decay
incantations.description: Superior incantation of Dragon Communion. Channels the power of Ekzykes, the Decaying.
incantations.effects: Spews scarlet rot breath of Ekzykes from above

incantations.name: Fire's Deadly Sin
incantations.description: Incantation originating from a deeply ominous prophecy.
incantations.effects: Sets area and self ablaze with raging flames

incantations.name: Erdtree Heal
incantations.description: One of the ancient Erdtree incantations.
incantations.effects: Vastly heals HP for self and nearby allies

incantations.name: Flame, Fall Upon Them
incantations.description: One of the incantations that draws directly from the power of the
incantations.effects: Hurls several balls of fire at once

incantations.name: Ezykes's Decay
incantations.description: Spews scarlet rot breath of Ekzykes from above

incantations.name: Electrify Armament
incantations.description: One of the incantations of the capital's ancient dragon cult.
incantations.effects: Enchants right-hand armament with lightning damage

incantations.name: Flame Fortification
incantations.description: Incantation of the Two Fingers' faithful.
incantations.effects: Increases fire damage negation.

incantations.name: Flame Of The Fell God
incantations.description: This legendary incantation is one of several that draws directly from the power of the Fire Giants. Releases a ball of raging fire said to be inhabited by a fell god. The fireball floats toward enemies and explodes, setting the area ablaze. Arghanthy, the chief guardian of the Flame, had kept this incantation a well-kept secret until it was stolen by Adan. The fell god still lurks within the Fire Giants.
incantations.effects: Summons raging fireball that explodes and sets the area ablaze

incantations.name: Elden Stars
incantations.description: This legendary incantation is the most ancient of those that derive from the Erdtree.
incantations.effects: Creates a steam of golden shooting stars that assail the area.

incantations.name: Flame, Protect Me
incantations.description: The most ancient of the Fire Monks' incantations.
incantations.effects: Greatly increases fire damage negation

incantations.name: Fortissax's Lightning Spear
incantations.description: Incantation that channels the power of the ancient dragon Fortissax.
incantations.effects: Stabs from above with two red lightning spears in tandem

incantations.name: Frozen Lightning Spear
incantations.description: Incantation that channels the power of the Dragonkin Soldiers. Creates a spear of ice lightning and stabs it into the ground from above. On impact, the spear will burst into trails of lightning advancing forwards. The Dragonkin were born in the Eternal City, where they knew no true sky, nor true lightning. Instead, ice lightning was their weapon.
incantations.effects: Stabs with ice lightning spear from above

incantations.name: Glintstone Breath
incantations.description: One of the incantations of Dragon Communion.
incantations.effects: Channels dragon to spew icy breath.

incantations.name: Golden Lightning Fortification
incantations.description: An incantation of Erdtree Worship.
incantations.effects: Greatly increases lightning resistance for self and allies

incantations.name: Frenzied Burst
incantations.description: Incantations originating from the maddening Three Fingers.
incantations.effects: Emits concentrated blast of yellow flame of frenzy from eyes

incantations.name: Giantsflame Take Thee
incantations.description: One of the incantations that draws directly from the power of the
incantations.effects: Hurls massive ball of raging fire

incantations.name: Golden Vow (spell)
incantations.description: An incantation of Erdtree Worship.
incantations.effects: Increases attack and defense for self and allies

incantations.name: Gurrang's Beast Claw
incantations.description: Superior incantation taught by Gurranq, the Beast Clergyman.
incantations.effects: Creates beast claws to rend surroundings with shockwaves

incantations.name: Immutable Shield
incantations.description: One of the incantations of the Golden Order fundamentalists.
incantations.effects: Increases left-hand shield's affinity/ailment resistance

incantations.name: Heal
incantations.description: Incantation of the Two Fingers' faithful.
incantations.effects: Heals HP for you and nearby allies.

incantations.name: Howl Of Shabriri
incantations.description: Incantation originating from the maddening Three Fingers.
incantations.effects: Shrieks, building up madness in nearby foes

incantations.name: Great Heal
incantations.description: Superior incantation of the Two Fingers' faithful.
incantations.effects: Greatly Heals HP for self and nearby allies

incantations.name: Greyoll's Roar
incantations.description: Superior incantation of Dragon Communion. Channels the power of Greyoll, the Elder Dragon. An incantation of legendary status.
incantations.effects: Emits the roar of Elder Dragon Greyoll.

incantations.name: Inescapable Frenzy
incantations.description: Incantation originating from the maddening Three Fingers.
incantations.effects: Latches onto foes to spread madness

incantations.name: Honed Bolt
incantations.description: One of the incantations of the capital's ancient dragon cult.
incantations.effects: Strikes foe with lightning bolt from above

incantations.name: Lansseax's Glaive
incantations.description: Incantation that channels the powr of the ancient dragon Lansseax.
incantations.effects: Sweeps from above with red lightning glaive.

incantations.name: Lightning Fortification
incantations.description: Incantation of the Two Fingers' faithful.
incantations.effects: Increass lighting damage negation

incantations.name: Lord's Aid
incantations.description: Incantation bestowed by the Two Fingers upon the Tarnished
incantations.effects: Alleviates poison / blood loss / sleep buildup for self / allies

incantations.name: Lightning Spear
incantations.description: One of the incantations of the capital's ancient dragon cult. Summons a lightning spear and hurls it before the caster. Charging causes a lightning bolt to strike the point ofimpact. Long ago, Godwyn the Golden defeated the ancient dragon Fortissax, and befriended his fallen foe — an event that gave rise to the ancient dragon cult in the capital.
incantations.effects: Hurls lightning spear before caster

incantations.name: Law Of Causality
incantations.description: One of the incantations of the Golden Order fundamentalists.
incantations.effects: Retaliates upon receiving a number of blows

incantations.name: Litany Of Proper Death
incantations.description: One of the incantations of the Golden Order fundamentalists.
incantations.effects: Creates image of Order to deal holy damage

incantations.name: Law Of Regression
incantations.description: Incantation of the Golden Order fundamentalists. One of the key fundamentals. Heals all negative statuses, dispels special effects, and reveals mimicry in all its forms. The fundamentalists describe the Golden Order through the powers of regression and causality. Regression is the pull of meaning; that all things yearn eternally to converge.
incantations.effects: Heals all ailments and dispels all special effects

incantations.name: Lightning Strike
incantations.description: One of the incantations of the capital's ancient dragon cult.
incantations.effects: Summons lightning bolt that spreads from impact.

incantations.name: Lord's Divine Fortification
incantations.description: Incantation taught to Gideon the All-Knowing by the Two
incantations.effects: Greatly increases holy damage negation incl. allies

incantations.name: Lord's Heal
incantations.description: Incantation bestowed by the Two Fingers upon the Tarnished
incantations.effects: Massively heals HP for self and nearby allies

incantations.name: Order Healing
incantations.description: One of the incantations of the Golden Order fundamentalists.
incantations.effects: Alleviates death blight buildup

incantations.name: Noble Presence
incantations.description: Ancient power of the Godskin Nobles.
incantations.effects: Thrust out belly with gusto to unelash repelling shockwave

incantations.name: Order's Blade
incantations.description: One of the incantations of the Golden Order fundamentalists. Used by hunters of Those Who Live in Death. Enchants armament held in the right hand with holy-affinity attacks. This incantation is especially damaging to Those Who Live in Death. Any felled by this incantation cannot be revived. The role of the hunters is to stamp out defiled reason - all for the perfection of the Golden Order.
incantations.effects: Enchanted right-hand armament with holy damage

incantations.name: Magic Fortification
incantations.description: Incantation of the Two Fingers' faithful. Increases magic damage negation. This incantation can be cast while in motion. Follow the path that has been set for you, and you will make enemies of all others: the monks, the sorcerers, the ancient dragon knights, and the scions of gold. Heed me – the Lands Between offers no welcome to the Tarnished.
incantations.effects: Increases magic damage negation

incantations.name: O, Flame!
incantations.description: Incantation of the Fire Monks.
incantations.effects: Momentarily sparks roaring flame from hand

incantations.name: Magma Breath
incantations.description: One of the incantations of Dragon Communion.
incantations.effects: Channels wyrm to spew magma breath

incantations.name: Pest Threads
incantations.description: Incantation of the servants of rot.
incantations.effects: Launches countless sticky threads before caster

incantations.name: Protection Of The Erdtree
incantations.description: A superior incantation of Erdtree Worship. Increase damage negation for all affinities except physical, for both the caster and nearby allies. Hold to continue praying and delay activation. In the beginning, everything was in opposition to the Erdtree. But through countless victories in war, it became the embodiment of Order.
incantations.effects: Increases affinity damage negation for self & allies

incantations.name: Poison Armament
incantations.description: Incantation of the servants of rot. Enchants armament held in the right hand with poison. This incantation can be cast while in motion. Those who dwell within poison know rot all too well. The death that begets life, that comes to all equally. That is to say: it is the cycle of rebirth put into practice.

incantations.name: Placidusax's Ruin
incantations.description: Power gleaned form the remembrance of Dragonlord Placidusax.
incantations.effects: Spews golden breath of Dragonlord Placidusax

incantations.name: Poison Mist
incantations.description: Incantation of the servants of rot.
incantations.effects: Releases poison mist before caster.

incantations.name: Radagon's Rings Of Light
incantations.description: One of the incantations of the Golden Order fundamentalists.
incantations.effects: Creates golden ring of light to attack wide area

incantations.name: Rotten Breath
incantations.description: One of the incantations of Dragon Communion.
incantations.effects: Channels dragon to spew scarlet rot breath

incantations.name: Rejection
incantations.description: Incantation of the Two Fingers' faithful.
incantations.effects: Produces a shockwave that pushes away foes.

incantations.name: Smarag's Glintstone Breath
incantations.description: Superior incantation of Dragon Communion.
incantations.effects: Spews magic breath of Glintstone Dragon Smarag from above

incantations.name: Stone Of Gurranq
incantations.description: Superior incantation taught by Gurranq, the Beast Clergyman.
incantations.effects: Hurls a boulder before the caster

incantations.name: Surge, O Flame!
incantations.description: Superior incantation of the Fire Monks.
incantations.effects: Incinerates area before caster with stream of fire

incantations.name: Shadow Bait
incantations.description: Incantation of the Two Fingers' sewants, who once served as the
incantations.effects: Creates shadow that lures the aggression of foes of human build

incantations.name: Scouring Black Flame
incantations.description: A black flame incantation of the Godskin Apostles. Sweeps a wide area before the caster with black flame. Charging enhances range. The black flame could once slay gods. But when Maliketh sealed Destined Death, the true power of the black flame was lost.
incantations.effects: Sweeps area before caster with black flame

incantations.name: Scarlet Aeonia
incantations.description: Technique of Malenia, the Goddess of Rot.
incantations.effects: Creates a giant flower that explodes with scarlet rot.

incantations.name: Swarm Of Flies
incantations.description: A Blood Oath incantation, shared from the Lord of Blood's power. Releases a swarm of bloodflies before the caster to assault foes. The vile swarm deals damage and builds up onset of blood loss. This incantation can be cast while in motion. The new palace of the Lord of Blood lies in a swamp of festering blood, and these flies are said to spawn from excrement in that land.
incantations.effects: Releases a swarm of bloodflies before the caster

incantations.name: The Flame Of Frenzy
incantations.description: Incantation originating from the maddening Three Fingers.
incantations.effects: Emits burst of yellow flame of frenzy from eyes

incantations.name: Theodorix's Magma
incantations.description: Superior incantation of Dragon Communion. Channels the power of the great wyrm Theodorix. Transforms caster into a great wyrm to spew a large volume of magma breath. Allows one follow-up attack. The name of the ancient troll warrior Theodorix lives on — as a hero of the War against the Giants.
incantations.effects: Spews magma breath of Theodorix from above

incantations.name: Unendurable Frenzy
incantations.description: Incantation originating from the maddening Three Fingers. Causes the yellow flame of frenzy to violently burst forth from the caster's eyes. Hold to continue channeling the flame. This incantation can be used while in motion. It is the maddening pain and unstoppable tears of those afflicted with the flame of frenzy brought into being.
incantations.effects: Emits violent burst of yellow flame of frenzy from eyes.

incantations.name: Triple Rings Of Light
incantations.description: One of the incantations of the Golden Order fundamentalists. Produces three rings of light and fires them forwards. The rings of light return to a position close to the caster before disappearing. This incantation can be cast repeatedly. A gift from the young Ivliquella to his father, Radagon.
incantations.effects: Fire three rings of light before the caster

incantations.name: Whirl, O Flame!
incantations.description: Superior Incantation of the Fire Monks.
incantations.effects: Sweeps area before caster with stream of fire

incantations.name: Vyke's Dragonbolt
incantations.description: Incantation of Vyke, knight of the Roundtable Hold.
incantations.effects: Enchants right-hand armament with lightning damage

incantations.name: Urgent Heal
incantations.description: Incantation of the Two Fingers faithful.
incantations.effects: Heals a small amount of HP.

incantations.name: Wrath Of Gold
incantations.description: Superior Erdtree Worship incantation. Produces a golden shockwave that knocks back nearby foes. Charging increases the size of the shockwave. This incantation was discovered when the Elden Ring was shattered, and it was feared as a sign of the Erdtree's wrath.
incantations.effects: Produces golden shockwave that knocks back foes

spirits.name: Albinauric Ashes
spirits.description: Ashen remains in which spirits yet dwell. Use to summon the spirits of two Albinaurics.

spirits.name: Ancestral Follower Ashes
spirits.description: Ashen remains in which spirits yet dwell. Use to summon the spirit of an ancestral follower.

spirits.name: Archer Ashes
spirits.description: Ashen remains in which spirits yet dwell. Use to summon three archer spirits.

spirits.name: Avionette Soldier Ashes
spirits.description: Ashen remains in which spirits yet dwell. Use to summon the spirits of two avionette soldiers. Spirits of marionette soldiers with avian features that were created to serve a sorcerer. Equipped with long-hafted scythes, they also attack from the skies by lobbing fire pots. Can sometimes malfunction when damaged.
spirits.effect: Summon the spirits of two avionette soldiers

spirits.name: Banished Knight Oleg
spirits.description: Ashen remains in which spirits yet dwell. Use to summon the spirit of Oleg, the Banished Knight.

spirits.name: Demi-human Ashes
spirits.description: Ashen remains in which spirits yet dwell. Use to summon the spirits of five demi-humans.

spirits.name: Fanged Imp Ashes
spirits.description: Ashes remains in which spirits yet dwell. Use to summon two fanged imp spirits.

spirits.name: Finger Maiden Therolina Puppet
spirits.description: One of Seluvis's puppets.
spirits.effect: Summons spirit of Finger Maiden Therolina

spirits.name: Giant Rat Ashes
spirits.description: Ashen remains in which spirits yet dwell. Use to summon the spirits of three giant rats.

spirits.name: Black Knife Tiche
spirits.description: Legendary ashen remains. Use to summon the spirit of Black Knife Tiche.
spirits.effect: Summons spirit of Black Knife Tiche

spirits.name: Glintstone Sorcerer Ashes
spirits.description: Ashen remains in which spirits yet dwell. Use to summon the spirit of a glintstone sorcerer.

spirits.name: Godrick Soldier Ashes
spirits.description: Ashen remains in which spirits yet dwell. Use to summon the spirits of two of Godrick's soldiers.

spirits.name: Jarwight Puppet
spirits.description: One of Seluvis' puppets. Use to summon the spirit of a jarwight.

spirits.name: Kaiden Sellsword Ashes
spirits.description: Ashen remains in which spirits yet dwell.Use to summon the spirit of a Kaiden sellsword.

spirits.name: Greatshield Soldier Ashes
spirits.description: Ashen remains in which spirits yet dwell. Use to summon five greatshield soldier spirits.

spirits.name: Lhutel The Headless
spirits.description: Legendary ashen remains. Use to summon the spirit of Lhutel the Headless.
spirits.effect: Summons spirit of Lhutel the Headless

spirits.name: Mad Pumpkin Head Ashes
spirits.description: Ashen remains in which spirits yet dwell. Use to summon the spirit of a mad pumpkin head. Spirit of a mad soldier with a large, brawny physique. Though he has stifled his panic within the dark confines of his helmet, he rampages as if driven mad when agitated by bloodshed or the humming of insects. This mad soldier is all that is left of a broken gladiator.
spirits.effect: Summon the spirit of a mad pumpkin head

spirits.name: Marionette Soldier Ashes
spirits.description: Ashen remains in which spirits yet dwell. Use to summon the spirits of two marionette soldiers.

spirits.name: Lone Wolf Ashes
spirits.description: Ashen remains in which spirits yet dwell. Use to summon the spirits of three lone wolves.

spirits.name: Mimic Tear Ashes
spirits.description: Legendary ashen remains. Use to summon the spirit of a mimic tear. Summoning consumes HP rather than FP.

spirits.name: Nightmaiden & Swordtress Puppets
spirits.description: An old puppet crafted in the Eternal City.

spirits.name: Noble Sorcerer Ashes
spirits.description: Ashen remains in which spirits yet dwell. Use to summon the spirit of a noble sorcerer. Spirit of a nobleman who once asked to be given a place at Raya Lucaria to learn glintstone sorceries. His talents were insufficient to be worthy of donning the stone crown, however, and he is only capable ofusing the most rudimentary sorcery.

spirits.name: Nomad Ashes
spirits.description: Ashen remains in which spirits yet dwell. Use to summon the spirit of a nomad.

spirits.name: Omenkiller Rollo
spirits.description: Ashen remains in which spirits yet dwell. Use to summon the spirit of Omenkiller Rollo.

spirits.name: Raya Lucaria Soldier Ashes
spirits.description: Ashen remains in which spirits yet dwell. Use to summon the spirits of three Raya Lucaria soldiers.
spirits.effect: Summons three Raya Lucaria soldier spirits

spirits.name: Page Ashes
spirits.description: Ashen remains in which spirits yet dwell. Use to summon the spirit of a page.

spirits.name: Skeletal Militiaman Ashes
spirits.description: Ashen remains in which spirits yet dwell. Use to summon the spirits of two skeletal militiamen.

spirits.name: Spirit Jellyfish Ashes
spirits.description: Ashen remains in which spirits yet dwell. Use to summon a spirit jellyfish.

spirits.name: Skeletal Bandit Ashes
spirits.description: Ashen remains in which spirits yet dwell. Use to summon the spirits of a skeletal bandit.

spirits.name: Stormhawk Deenh
spirits.description: Ashen remains in which spirits yet dwell. Use to summon the spirit of Deenh the Stormhawk.
